text:
Roaming Ruby (さまようルビー) is a card found in the Greed Island game. It is one of the game's 100 designated slot cards and is required for a player to complete the game.
__NOTOC__

Summary

Roaming Ruby さまようルビー - This card when used, summons forth a beautiful Ruby. The owner of it will become immensely wealthy, with the condition that the owner cannot remain in the same place for more than a week. The ruby will break if this condition is broken. Your entire fortune as part of this card's effect, will also disappear.

Card Description

{| border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE"
![Jap]
|No.076 :: さまようルビー 
このルビーの持ち主は巨万の富を得るかわりに定住を許されない。一週間と同じ地に留まることはないだろう。
|-
![Eng]
|No.076 :: Roaming Ruby 
Owner of this ruby is not allowed to settle in one place, in order for great wealth. Can't remain in the same place for a week.
|}

Trivia

Bara makes another G.I player use Risky Dice to increase his odds of gaining a rare card through the Lottery card. He gains this card instead of Wild Luck Alexandrite, which he was aiming for.
